title: DSK Blu Tack Original Reusable Adhesive Putty 60g – Multipurpose Sticky Tack for Crafts, Posters, Office & Home – Non-Toxic, Clean & Reusable Mounting Putty (Pack of 1)
features: VERSATILE ADHESIVE: Original reusable adhesive putty perfect for mounting posters, cards, decorations and lightweight items to walls, doors, and other surfaces
CLEAN REMOVAL: Leaves no permanent marks and can be easily removed from most surfaces without damaging them - simply peel off and roll clean
LONG-LASTING USE: Can be reused multiple times by kneading the putty back together, maintaining its adhesive properties for extended periods
CONVENIENT SIZE: 60g pack provides ample amount for various household and office applications whilst being compact and easy to store
PRACTICAL DESIGN: Blue colour makes it easy to spot on most surfaces, can be separated into smaller pieces and shaped as needed for different uses
description: Discover the versatility of Blu Tack, the original reusable adhesive that has become a household essential. This 60g pack of blue putty-like adhesive offers countless uses around home, office, or classroom. Perfect for hanging posters, cards, and decorations on walls without leaving marks, this multipurpose adhesive can be easily removed and reused multiple times. The malleable texture allows you to shape it exactly as needed, making it ideal for both practical fixes and creative projects. Unlike traditional tape or pins, Blu Tack provides a clean solution that won't damage your surfaces. The convenient 60g size ensures you'll always have enough on hand for various tasks. Whether you're organising your workspace, creating temporary displays, or securing lightweight items, Bostik Blu Tack delivers reliable adhesion that you can trust. Simply knead, position, and press - it's that simple to use.
